sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 104

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 104:1
items.html:
(to the question) Dregs of wine
Like wine: after it is strained, there remain behind it the dregs that necessarily accompany it. So it is in the clarifications of the Sefirot: after the clarifications there always remains refuse that is not fit to be clarified at that degree, and it returns to the mixture of the Klipot, in the secret of the dregs of the wine. See Answer 34. (Item 73)
